title: Crispy Uruguayan Potato Salad
description: A savory, crisp salad that combines golden fried potatoes with fresh herbs, corn, and chickpeas for a romantic, vegetarian-friendly dish.
instructions: Boil the diced potatoes in salted water until just tender, about 10 minutes; drain and let cool to room temperature.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and add the cooled potatoes, seasoning with salt and pepper; sauté, turning occasionally, until golden and crispy, about 8 minutes.
Transfer the crispy potatoes to a large bowl and let them rest for 5 minutes.
Add the diced red onion, corn kernels, chickpeas, parsley, lemon juice, and smoked paprika to the bowl; gently toss to combine and distribute the flavors.
Cover and refrigerate the salad for at least 20 minutes to allow the flavors to meld and the potatoes to firm up a little.
Serve chilled or at room temperature, garnished with extra parsley if desired.
